start_gcode:
;FLAVOR:Marlin
; --- INICIALIZACE TISKÁRNY PRO KAPALINY ---
M201 X1000 Y1000 Z200 E5000
M203 X200 Y200 Z12 E120
M204 S1250 T1250
M205 X8.00 Y8.00 Z0.40 E4.50
M205 S0 T0

G90 ; use absolute coordinates
M83 ; extruder RELATIVE mode
M302 P1 ; disable cold extrusion checking
M302 S0 ; always allow extrusion
M900 K0 ; disable Linear Advance for liquids

G4 S1
M300 S900 P150
M1 Push down the PINDA
G28
G92 E0.0
G0 Z20
G0 Y200 F5000
G4 S1
M300 S900 P150
M1 Retract the PINDA
G0 Y10 F5000
end_gcode:
G0 Z30 F1000 ; Zvednuti tiskove hlavy
G0 X0 Y200 F3000 ; Vysunuti podlozky vpred
M84 ; Vypnuti motoru
